title: Reconstitution of Central Advisory Board u/s 8(a) of COFEPOSA Act for year 1985-86
description: Reconstitution of Central Advisory Board u/s 8(a) of COFEPOSA Act for year 1985-86
text: REGISTERED NO. D. (D.N.)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 103] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, MARCH 11, 1985/PHALGUNA 20, 1906 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation 1689 GI/84 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 11th March, 1985 G.S.R. 145 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of section 8 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974), the Central Government hereby constitutes an Advisory Board consisting of :— CHAIRMAN 1. Hori'ble Mr. Justice T.P.S. Chawla, Judge of the Delhi High, Court. MEMBERS 2. Hon'ble Mr. Justice S. S. Chadha, Judge of the Delhi High Court. 3. Hon'ble Mr. Justice Leila Seth, Judge of the Delhi High Court. 2. The term of the Advisory Board shall be up to the 10th March, 1986, from the date of this notification. [F. No. 674|l|85-.Cus. VIII] M. G. VENUGOPALAN, Dy. Secy. t>MNTED BY THE MANAGER, GOVT.
